spec_match.rationale: The page detects support with HTMLSelectedContentElement and renders one button mirror plus three additional selectedcontent descendants inside the select.

interactive.rationale: Selecting a color updates all native mirrors and appends a timestamped log entry showing the cloned option text.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The copy and markup now both describe Chrome 150 cloning into all descendant selectedcontent elements.

edge_cases.rationale: Unsupported multi-clone behavior falls back by cloning the selected option into the real selectedcontent elements rather than replacing them with generic divs.

references.rationale: Links to the feature index, companion demos, and ChromeStatus.

design_system.rationale: Retains the card builder layout while using shared CSS variables instead of raw color literals.

summary: Resolved: the demo no longer uses customElements.get or simulated div mirrors; every displayed mirror is a selectedcontent descendant of the select.
